title: Moscow Skies
writer: Mikhail Bleiman, Manuel Bolshintsov, Giorgi Mdivani
actors: Pyotr Aleynikov, Nina Mazaeva, Nikolay Bogolyubov
plot: Based on the exploits of a real-life fighter hero during the Great Patriotic War, the film portrays the role aviators played in defending Moscow in the fall of 1941.
